text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: I really did it huh… Defeated once again.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Even though you've been enthusiastically 
watching over my training all this time…
choice_data_list: No need to apologize, you did your best
No need to apologize, you did your best

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Even though you've been enthusiastically 
watching over my training all this time…
choice_data_list: No need to apologize, you did your best
No need to apologize, you did your best

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: No… My determination just wasn't enough.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: This won't happen again. I will definitely win.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
The path of this journey… I was the one 
who entangled you in all this, so it's my 
responsibility to bring an end to it.

I found myself unable to move from her 
terrifyingly serious gaze. I also need to 
step up my game so that I can ensure 
she wins the next one…!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
"Together" you say… That's right, you're 
the type to say something like that.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
We are travelling companions. Comrades 
who decided to trek the same path…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Fuu… that's reassuring. Let us continue, no matter how treacherous the path may be.

I nodded strongly to her comment. That's 
right, we're both on the same path. Let's 
confirm our determination, and continue 
this together…!
